title: Add force_alpha parameter to discrete Naive Bayes estimators
description:
sklearn 1.4+: discrete NB classifiers have force_alpha: bool = True. When False and alpha < 1e-10, alpha is silently raised to 1e-10 (legacy behavior). When True, the user-supplied alpha is used as-is.

ferrolearn-bayes currently uses alpha as-is (matches force_alpha=True). Add with_force_alpha(bool) builder; when False, clamp alpha to >= 1e-10 internally. Add tests for both modes.

Affected: MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB, ComplementNB, CategoricalNB.
